nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 中美翠蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 中美翠蜂鸟（Hispaniolan emerald，学名 Riccordia swainsonii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the interior and edges of dense montane rainforest, scrublands, and coffee plantations

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the Hispaniolan emerald as being of Least Concern, though its population size and trend are not known. Though Hispaniola is a large island, the species is threatened by deforestation, especially in Haiti; however, it is confirmed to occur in at least two protected areas in that country
